title: How Anthropic Doesn't Build the WRONG Things with Claude
summary: Austin Marchese outlines four decision rules derived from Anthropic founders Dario and Daniela Amodei for determining what products to build with Claude. The video presents a framework for avoiding product-market misalignment by applying principles allegedly used by Anthropic to guide builders of all scales.
